note: Chart area bounds are practical rectangular cuts in the 2000x1000 logical grid. Areas overlap at coasts. Prefer smaller cuts (~200–350 px) for 1px terrain editing in the port map editor.

chart_areas.name: Atlantic Iberia (Gades)
chart_areas.description: Gades and the Atlantic facade west of the Pillars.

chart_areas.name: Strait of Gibraltar
chart_areas.description: Pillars of Hercules — Gades, Sexi, Tingis, and the channel.

chart_areas.name: Iberian Mediterranean coast
chart_areas.description: Baetis to Emporion — Nova Carthago and the Catalan shore.

chart_areas.name: Ligurian sea & Gulf of Lion
chart_areas.description: Massalia, Narbonensis, and the Gallic littoral.

chart_areas.name: Etruria & north Tyrrhenian
chart_areas.description: Populonia, Caere, Pyrgi, and the Tuscan littoral.

chart_areas.name: Sardinia
chart_areas.description: Caralis, Sulci, Tharros, and Olbia.

chart_areas.name: Latium & Campania
chart_areas.description: Rome, Ostia, Naples, Cumae, and the Tyrrhenian toe.

chart_areas.name: Sicily
chart_areas.description: Panormus to Syracuse — the Sicilian ring.

chart_areas.name: Strait of Messina
chart_areas.description: Messana, Rhegium, and the narrows to Magna Graecia.

chart_areas.name: Magna Graecia
chart_areas.description: Taras, Croton, Locri, and the Calabrian instep.

chart_areas.name: Tunisia & Carthage
chart_areas.description: Carthage, Utica, Hippo, and the African shore opposite Sicily.

chart_areas.name: Tripolitania
chart_areas.description: Oea, Sabratha, and Leptis Magna.

chart_areas.name: Cyrenaica
chart_areas.description: Cyrene and Apollonia — the Libyan pentapolis coast.

chart_areas.name: Nile delta & Egypt
chart_areas.description: Alexandria, Naucratis, Memphis, and the grain mouths.

chart_areas.name: Greece (mainland)
chart_areas.description: Athens, Corinth, Megara, and the Peloponnese approaches.

chart_areas.name: Ionia & Caria
chart_areas.description: Smyrna, Ephesus, Miletus, Halicarnassus.

chart_areas.name: Crete & Dodecanese
chart_areas.description: Knossos, Rhodes, and the southern Aegean gate.

chart_areas.name: Cyprus
chart_areas.description: Salamis, Kition, Paphos, and the copper isle.

chart_areas.name: Phoenicia & Levant coast
chart_areas.description: Tyre, Sidon, Byblos, and the Syrian strand.

chart_areas.name: Propontis (Marmara)
chart_areas.description: Byzantium and Chalcedon — Marmara mouth.

chart_areas.name: Pontus Euxinus
chart_areas.description: Sinope, Trapezus, Olbia, and the Black Sea grain horizon.
